description: Reference corpus of 'this, not that' pairs from style guides with commercial-OK licenses (CC-BY, OGL, CC0). Trimmed and anonymized per ADRs 2026-05-06-corpus-license-trim and 2026-05-06-source-name-anonymization. Entries outside the commercial-OK envelope were removed; remaining entries' source_system fields are functional descriptors rather than brand names so the public repo no longer attributes by name.

pairs.not_this: We will endeavour to utilise the most appropriate methodology.
pairs.rationale: UK national-government's plain-English canon: prefer 'use' over 'utilise', 'try' over 'endeavour'.

pairs.not_this: Failure to comply with the aforementioned stipulations may result in penalties.
pairs.but_this: If you don't follow these rules, you may be fined.
pairs.rationale: 18F: plain language even in compliance contexts — accessibility is a civic obligation.

pairs.not_this: When you change your password you will be signed out of all devices and will need to sign back in on each one using your new password within the next 24 hours.
pairs.but_this: Changing your password signs you out everywhere. Sign back in with the new password within 24 hours.
pairs.rationale: UK national-government target: ≤25 words per sentence. Split at natural consequence boundaries.

pairs.not_this: The file was uploaded by the user.
pairs.rationale: Active voice puts the actor first; inverts passive construction.
Material: name what comes next, not the act of proceeding.
Google: sentence case for UI labels. Capitalize only proper nouns + first word.
UK national-government: link text must describe the destination. 'Click here' fails for screen-reader users who hear links out of context.

pairs.not_this: Applicants must submit documentation prior to commencement.
pairs.but_this: Send your documents before you start.
pairs.rationale: US federal design system: federal guidance — plain language serves accessibility and civic participation.
Microsoft: 'Yes' buttons rely on the reader remembering the question; action verbs survive standalone reading.

pairs.not_this: Users should enter their address here.
pairs.rationale: UK national-government: drop third-person references to 'users' in UI strings. Talk to the reader directly.

pairs.not_this: If a applicant meet the criteria...
pairs.but_this: If an applicant meets the criteria...
pairs.rationale: US federal design system: grammar errors in federal copy erode trust. Subject-verb agreement + a/an distinction.
Microsoft: don't end headings with periods. Headings aren't sentences; the period reads as a stop where the eye expects continuation.
